issues: Code imports correct adapter 'price_only' and uses 'fetch_prices' as per adapter contract.
Code uses 'Close' column from adapter output as required.
Code expects 'implied_volatility_percentile_30d' column which is not provided by 'price_only' adapter; this violates adapter contract.
Signal logic correctly implements IV spike detection and next-day price move conditions as per spec.
Exit logic implements time-based exit after 3 days and stop loss of 1% retracement as per spec.
Allocation logic allocates 2% total divided equally among universe tickers on RISK_ON signal, which does not match spec requiring 2% per position (i.e., 2% per ticker triggering entry).
Signal names RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD are acceptable and treated correctly.
Overall, failure due to use of non-adapter columns and incorrect allocation sizing.
